data.description:
## Why
Epic 88ab (elfish-chair-lug) S2. The voter fail-closes with HTTP 409 on any merge commit today (`gerrit_client.get_patch` — "Revision has more than 1 parent"), blocking the pattern; and `patch?parent=1` would review the ENTIRE feature (violates R1). The bot needs a distinct merge-change path reviewing ONLY the auto-merge delta (conflict resolutions), fail-closed preserved.

## What
**FIRST (riskiest assumption):** capture a live fixture from the running Gerrit 3.14.1 proving `files/` with no `parent` returns the auto-merge-base file map for a merge commit (fixture committed to tests; cite rest-api-changes.html#list-files).
- `src/rebar/review_bot/voter.py`: merge detection (`revisions/{rev}/commit` parents >= 2) INSIDE `review_and_vote`, after the existing-vote check, BEFORE any diff fetch — identical for webhook, reconciler-backfill, and /rerun (reconcile.py needs NO change; a test routes a merge event through the backfill path). The extra commit GET per review is accepted overhead; errors on it fail closed.
- `src/rebar/review_bot/gerrit_client.py`: new `get_commit`, `get_merge_files` (no parent), `get_file_diff` (auto-merge base), `get_mergelist`. NEVER bare `/patch` on merges (unit test asserts the 409 path stays fail-closed). ANY merge-path REST failure (commit/files/diff/mergelist) → fail-closed -1 with the existing coverage-gap (infra) tag.
- `src/rebar/llm/code_review/assemble.py`: `assemble_merge_change_context(merge_files, file_diffs, mergelist)` — the file list from `get_merge_files` IS an explicit input (finding fe192771). Format: `## Merge context` (integrated-commit subject lines; `MERGELIST_MAX_COMMITS = 100` is a COUNT pre-cap with truncation notice) then `## Auto-merge diff`; `DIFF_CHAR_CAP` governs the COMBINED string — mergelist section capped first, diff truncated last (f95ed0c3); per-file diffs fetched only until the combined cap is reached — bounds the sequential REST fan-out; note the latency budget (fc2fb799). Empty-auto-merge-diff (clean merge): review proceeds on mergelist-only context; robot comment states the conflict delta was empty.
- Data flow into the gate UNCHANGED: assembled string → `adapter.code_review_decision(diff_text=…)` → `produce_code_review_verdict(cfg, diff_text=…)`.
- `src/rebar/review_bot/adapter.py`: `_TAG_SUFFIXES` reuses existing verdict keys, appending `(merge-change, N integrated commits)`.
- Observability: journald events `merge_change_review`, `merge_change_409_guard` (ERROR), `mergelist_fetch_error` (ERROR); CloudWatch metric `review_bot_merge_change_errors` (reason-tagged) via `infra/scripts/observability.sh` exactly as `voter_errors`, PLUS the `aws_cloudwatch_metric_alarm` terraform resource modelled on `monitoring_s4b.tf` (f487d44b).
- Tests: extend `_FakeGerrit` in `tests/unit/test_review_bot.py` with the four new methods (f0f74d65); fixture tests for context assembly, cap apportionment, empty diff, 409 guard, REST-failure fallbacks, backfill routing.

## Scope
Bot + assemble seam + monitoring + tests. No Gerrit config (S1), no g2p/CI (S3), runbook prose is S4 (this story only names the log signals).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Live 3.14.1 fixture proving the files/ auto-merge default is committed with the citing test
- [ ] Merge detection in review_and_vote covers webhook + backfill + /rerun paths (tests prove all three)
- [ ] 409-guard unit test: bare /patch on a merge stays fail-closed; every merge-path REST failure votes -1 with coverage-gap tag
- [ ] assemble_merge_change_context implements the documented format + cap apportionment (unit-tested incl. empty-diff + truncation cases)
- [ ] Robot comment carries the merge-change tag variant with integrated-commit count
- [ ] Metric + alarm applied; log events observable in journald
- [ ] make lint && make test green; live smoke: a merge change on the running Gerrit receives a vote with the merge-change tag
data.title: S2: Review-bot merge-change review path — auto-merge base via files/ + per-file diff + mergelist
